message:
fix(sqlite): make Close() idempotent to prevent WAL retry deadlock (bd-4ri)

SQLiteStorage.Close() was not idempotent -- double-close triggered the WAL
checkpoint retry loop (~3.1s backoff per call). With 81 double-closes from
t.Cleanup overlapping manual Close() in tests, this added ~250s to the test
suite. Use CompareAndSwap on the closed flag so only the first call proceeds.

Also fix cleanup ordering in TestFallbackToDirectModeEnablesFlush to shut
down FlushManager before closing the store, preventing the deadlock where
the FlushManager background goroutine holds a DB connection while Close()
blocks on the sql.DB mutex.

Results: test suite 231s -> 103s, WAL checkpoint warnings 81 -> 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
